name: Life Extension
description: Requires an Elixir of Life and a cost paid in experience or permanent Corruption; delays the mystic’s aging by one year.

name: Telepathic Interrogation
description: Allows the mystic to read a victim’s thoughts by touch and receive yes/no answers from their subconscious through Will checks; after a failure, the interrogation cannot be repeated until the end of the chapter.

name: Form
description: Places a lasting illusory guise on the mystic or an ally for one week. The guise changes appearance and apparent height, but not attributes, abilities, or actual size.

name: Illusion
description: Creates a moving, speaking illusion with scent and sound that can distract others or carry out simple tasks, but cannot affect the physical world.

name: False Ground
description: Masks an area with an illusion, hiding danger or, conversely, showing a passage that does not exist. The illusion lasts indefinitely and must be renewed once a month.

name: Fata Morgana
description: Makes a created landscape real: the mystic can impose new geography on an area or raise a temporary structure for one month. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Enchanted Landscape
description: Covers an area with an illusion in which creatures become lost and cannot escape without a successful check. The effect lasts indefinitely until the mystic ends it.

name: Foresight
description: Allows the mystic to watch and hear events in a place they have previously visited. It is blocked by protective rituals and can be noticed by those versed in soothsaying.

name: Spell Tunnel
description: Opens a two-way mystical channel to a place accessible through Foresight, allowing spells and rituals that require no physical contact to be sent there and back.

name: Magic Circle
description: Creates a permanent circle for telepathic communication with other known Magic Circles; anyone standing nearby can receive its messages.

name: Seven-League Step
description: Creates a temporary circle to teleport the mystic and allies to a familiar permanent Magic Circle.

name: Sanctuary
description: Creates a magical dome over a chamber, concealing it from observation and outside mystical interference while also blocking target-linked rituals and circles within.

name: Soul Stone
description: Seals a dying creature’s soul in a crystal or binds the mystic’s own soul to it. The stone can accumulate and hold part of its owner’s permanent Corruption up to a limit.

name: Severed Connection
description: Cuts an object, creature, or area off from magical links to the outside world, canceling summons, scrying, teleportation, and ties to artifacts.

name: Divination
description: Grants one yes/no answer about the current adventure through a Will check; the ritual can be repeated once per chapter.

name: Borrowed Beast
description: Transfers the mystic’s consciousness into a small animal while leaving their own body in a trance. Its duration depends on the circumstances and can become indefinite inside a Witch Circle.

name: Familiar
description: Binds an animal familiar to the mystic with telepathic communication, shared senses, and the ability to split damage. The familiar can serve as a conduit and grow as a separate character.

name: Blood Bond
description: Transfers part of the mystic’s permanent Corruption to their familiar, lowering it for the master and increasing it for the beast.

name: Beast Companion
description: Empowers a familiar so that if it dies, it returns at the next dawn unless it perished from exceeding its Corruption limit.

name: Turn the Weather
description: Changes the local weather—calling up or dispersing storms, fogs, and other conditions—for half a day after one hour of preparation.

name: Erase Tracks
description: Erases physical traces left by the mystic and allies, including prints, scents, damage, and signs of interference, over the past or coming day.

name: Witch Circle
description: Creates a hidden living domain protected from outside influence and observation, where the mystic fully controls conditions and strengthens circle-related rituals.

name: Quick Growth
description: Instantly grows a plant from seed in suitable conditions and shapes it as desired; inside a Witch Circle, the growth ignores the season.

name: Living Fortress
description: Grows a fortification of living trees and thorns that defends its own passages and lasts for one season. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Call
description: Summons a known creature by means of one of its possessions and compels it to come to the ritual site without any chance to resist.

name: Chosen by Fate
description: Imposes a mission upon the target: actions that do not advance it become harder, while actions serving it gain a notable advantage until the ritual is lifted.

name: Torture
description: Places a lasting curse on the victim that exhausts them or inflicts other chosen torments until the connection is broken.

name: Black Sympathy
description: Lets the mystic torment a victim from afar through a doll, traces, or a personal belonging; the victim cannot heal while the agony lasts.

name: Necromancy
description: Allows yes/no questions to be asked of the dead at their remains or grave. Failure can lead to possession by the spirit and an obligation to fulfill its final wish.

name: Death Omen
description: Enhances Necromancy with an additional attempt and allows the mystic to ask the dead about things they did not know themselves but could have learned from other souls.

name: Lullaby
description: Puts a corrupted area or creature to sleep and hides non-aggressive allies from corrupted beings as long as the mystic keeps singing.

name: Restoration
description: Fully repairs a damaged item through song, but does not create a new one.

name: Retrieval
description: Reveals the path to a lost item if the mystic knows it already or can obtain an exact description of it.

name: Rite of Opening and Rite of Sealing
description: Opens any door, lock, or gate, or seals it mystically instead; opening something locked requires a Will check.

name: Fire Stories
description: Uses ashes to show what exactly burned and how it happened, letting the mystic witness scenes of the fire and the people who were present.

name: Burning Servant
description: Binds a fire creature to a suit of armor, turning it into a servant that guards the mystic, can develop over time, and can return after the armor is repaired.

name: Twin Servants
description: Allows the mystic to summon and control two Burning Servants at the same time.

name: Cleansing Flame
description: A bonfire slowly burns away the mystic’s own permanent Corruption through repeated Will checks at the cost of fire damage and 1 experience.

name: Prophecy
description: Allows one open-ended question about the future of the current adventure to be asked once per chapter, yielding a truthful though not necessarily direct answer.

name: Condemning Shackles
description: Consecrates chains or other restraints so that a bound creature cannot use mystical powers or abilities that require Will. The ritual must be renewed monthly.

name: Interrogation
description: Forces the target to answer yes/no questions truthfully as long as the mystic keeps winning Will checks against them.

name: Holy Smoke
description: Uses incense to reveal corrupted creatures nearby and show the degree of their Corruption.

name: Piercing Gaze
description: An enhanced unveiling of Corruption: it grants two checks to identify it, allows the mystic to see through Shadow Exchange, and can be performed without incense through self-denial.

name: Anointing
description: Before battle, grants 10 temporary Survivability, +d4 Armor, and +d4 damage on all attacks, but forbids any healing until the fight ends.

name: Consecration Rite
description: Consecrates an area or a weapon, blocks many hostile rituals, and harms corrupted creatures that remain within it.

name: Exorcism
description: Drives a possessing entity out of a creature or object; there can be up to three attempts to succeed, but total failure moves the entity into the mystic.

name: Atonement
description: Cleanses a supplicant of d4 permanent Corruption. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Pursuit
description: Allows the mystic to track a familiar corrupted creature and determine its location as long as the trail is not broken by water, a crowd, or protective conditions.

name: Protector
description: Returns a fallen templar as a protective companion to the mystic until its second death.

name: Runic Tattoos
description: Places runic tattoos on a creature at the cost of experience or permanent Corruption.

name: Distant Calligraphy
description: Leaves inscriptions and runic messages at any distance within a well-known area; when reinforced, the inscription can carry the power of Symbolism.

name: Magic Trap
description: Binds a mystical power to an object or place with a chosen trigger and an indefinite duration, until the trap is dispelled.

name: Runic Guardian
description: Animates a wooden or stone statue as an obedient guardian that can be strengthened with experience.

name: Shadow Exchange
description: Replaces a creature’s shadow with the mystic’s own, using a pattern made from its hair, blood, or a valued possession, thus hiding the target’s true nature from those who see Shadows.

name: Possession
description: Gives the mystic control over a victim’s body for one day through a personal sample or a direct ritual over the body, while the mystic’s own body lies in a trance.

name: Enslavement
description: Places a rune of complete submission on the victim’s skin, forcing them to obey commands without question until the rune is removed or destroyed.

name: Soul Trap
description: Intercepts the soul of someone who has just died and imprisons it in a vessel, denying access to it for Necromancy until the vessel is destroyed or purified.

name: Phylactery
description: Binds the mystic’s soul to a vessel and restores them to life beside it after d12 days following death, at the cost of experience or Corruption.

name: Resurrection
description: Raises the recently dead as an undead servant that retains its skills and remains fully obedient after a successful Will check.

name: Lord of Death
description: Prepares the mystic for safe undeath without decay and allows them to raise greater undead capable of commanding other undead.

name: Desecration Rite
description: Desecrates an area or object, turning it into a source of Corruption, healing for corrupted creatures, and interference for tracking rituals.

name: Fleshcraft
description: Turns the mystic’s hands into tools of flesh and lets them add or remove monstrous traits from a victim at the cost of Corruption.

name: Summon Vengeful Demon
description: Summons a vengeful demon into a prepared circle. Subjugation requires a Will check; on success, the demon hunts the mystic’s enemies or performs one service. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Summon Knowing Demon
description: Summons a knowing demon into a prepared circle. Subjugation requires a Will check; on success, the demon answers the mystic’s direct or open-ended questions. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Summon Guardian Demon
description: Summons a guardian demon into a prepared circle. Subjugation requires a Will check; on success, the demon guards an area according to the mystic’s instructions. Performing it costs 1 experience.

name: Demon Servant
description: An empowered version of one of the Demon Summoning rituals: the summoned demon obeys without question, gains experience, and can become the target of Blood Bond.

name: Blood Storm
description: Seals a blood storm into a weapon; when activated, it blinds enemies in the area and deals them d4 armor-ignoring damage each turn until they leave or find cover.

name: Earthquake
description: Seals a shockwave into a weapon that, when activated, knocks down nearby creatures or destroys a chosen structure at the cost of d6 temporary Corruption.
